title: Starboy
notes:
Gatefold sleeve.

"Secrets" contains portions of "Pale Shelter" written by Ronald Orzabal, published by BMG Rights Management (US) LLC. "Pale Shelter" performed by Tears For Fears, used courtesy of Virgin EMI Records. This composition embodies portions of "Talking In Your Sleep", written by G. Canler, J. Marions, W. Palamarchuk, M. Skill and P. Solley, published EMI April Music Inc. (ASCAP).

Runouts are etched apart from "STERLING," which is stamped.

[On the back cover, in the gatefold and on the labels:]
℗ & © 2016 The Weeknd XO, Inc.
Manufactured and Marketed by Republic Records a division of UMG Recordings, Inc. 
Distributed by Universal Music Distribution
